workload: SELECT SUM(x) FROM t over 65,536 i64 rows, hot cache
host: Apple M4 Mac mini, 16 GiB, macOS 26.5

engines.name: UltraSQL (kernel)
engines.note: vec/sum_i64 microbench at N=65536, criterion 100 samples; cited from benchmarks/results/2026-05-12-m4/results.md; no SQL surface yet

engines.name: DuckDB
engines.note: PRAGMA enable_profiling=json; latency field (full query wall-clock)

engines.name: SQLite
engines.note: .timer on user time (microsecond resolution); :memory: db; single-threaded so user ~= wall-clock

engines.name: PostgreSQL
engines.note: psql \timing over Unix socket; 50 warmup queries then 8 measured in same session

engines.name: ClickHouse
engines.note: clickhouse local --multiquery --format=JSON; statistics.elapsed; Memory engine table

engines.name: MySQL
engines.reason: Not installed; brew install mysql + mysqld init + start exceeded the 15-minute budget without sudo.
